decision.summary: Current model families, feature variants, calibration, and mass-search sweeps did not beat market. The next candidates must add genuinely new pre-fight information or better opponent/context normalization, not more variants of the same feature families.

pre_fight_rules: Use only data timestamped before the scheduled fight date.
Do not use fight result, post-fight totals, post-fight odds, or future opponent records.
Every signal must declare its data availability and fallback behavior as NaN, not silent zero.
Every candidate must beat market favorite by the predeclared gate before promotion is discussed.

source_data: opponent pre-fight records before each historical bout

feature_semantics.name: adj_recent_strike_diff_last_3
feature_semantics.meaning: Fighter A minus Fighter B recent significant-strike differential, adjusted by opponent quality at the time each prior fight occurred.

feature_semantics.name: adj_recent_grappling_diff_last_3
feature_semantics.meaning: Recent takedown/control/submission pressure differential adjusted for opponent defensive quality.

feature_semantics.name: quality_of_recent_opposition_diff
feature_semantics.meaning: Difference in recent opponent quality faced before the target fight.

feature_semantics.name: adj_recent_efficiency_trend_diff
feature_semantics.meaning: Slope of opponent-adjusted performance across the last three fights, fighter A minus fighter B.

existing_data_candidates.why_this_might_help: Current features include raw career stats and recent win/loss form but do not normalize recent performance by opponent quality. Market likely prices whether a fighter's recent record came against strong or weak UFC opposition.

validation_gate.minimum: Must improve log loss and Brier versus current XGBoost and reduce market gap in at least one residual cluster.
validation_gate.promotion: Must beat market favorite by +2pp ROI with log loss and Brier not worse on a locked future slice.

source_data: career striking rates before target fight
career wrestling/grappling rates before target fight

feature_semantics.name: striking_pressure_vs_defense_edge
feature_semantics.meaning: A fighter's striking output/accuracy pressure against opponent striking defense and absorption profile.

feature_semantics.name: wrestling_pressure_vs_tdd_edge
feature_semantics.meaning: Takedown attempt/success profile against opponent takedown defense.

feature_semantics.name: submission_pressure_vs_grappling_risk_edge
feature_semantics.meaning: Submission attempt tendency versus opponent grappling vulnerability proxy.

existing_data_candidates.why_this_might_help: Current features are mostly differentials. Interaction features can model matchups where the same raw fighter strength matters differently depending on opponent weakness.

validation_gate.minimum: Must improve probability quality in near-pickem or model/market-disagreement buckets.
validation_gate.promotion: Same market gate as all candidates.

source_data: UFC fight counts before target fight
days since last fight before target fight

feature_semantics.name: combined_low_info_flag
feature_semantics.meaning: 1 when either fighter has too few UFC fights, sparse recent form, or elevated missingness.

feature_semantics.name: low_info_asymmetry
feature_semantics.meaning: Difference in pre-fight information depth between fighters.

feature_semantics.name: uncertainty_adjusted_confidence_cap
feature_semantics.meaning: Signal for calibration experiments that should reduce model confidence in sparse-context fights.

existing_data_candidates.why_this_might_help: Availability flags improved ROI versus current XGBoost but failed probability quality. A more targeted uncertainty signal may help calibration without trying to infer winner strength.

validation_gate.minimum: Must reduce overconfidence in sparse/context-poor clusters without degrading overall log loss or Brier.
validation_gate.promotion: Same market gate as all candidates.

source_data: fighter historical same-weight-class records before target fight
fighter historical movement across UFC weight classes before target fight

feature_semantics.name: same_weight_class_experience_ratio
feature_semantics.meaning: Share of each fighter's prior UFC fights in the target weight class, expressed as fighter A minus fighter B.

feature_semantics.name: weight_class_move_direction_pair
feature_semantics.meaning: Directional interaction for up/down/stay movement by both fighters.

feature_semantics.name: weight_class_success_adjusted_diff
feature_semantics.meaning: Difference in prior success within the target weight class, with sparse rows left as NaN.

existing_data_candidates.why_this_might_help: Existing mass search over current weight features did not win, but weight-class movement may need directional interactions rather than simple differentials.

validation_gate.minimum: Must improve weight-class cluster residuals and not degrade overall probability quality.
validation_gate.promotion: Same market gate as all candidates.

feature_semantics.name: open_to_cutoff_no_vig_delta
feature_semantics.meaning: Change in no-vig implied probability from opener to a predeclared cutoff.

feature_semantics.name: late_steam_direction
feature_semantics.meaning: Direction and magnitude of line movement near the locked cutoff.

feature_semantics.name: book_disagreement_width
feature_semantics.meaning: Cross-book spread in no-vig probabilities at cutoff.

new_data_candidates.why_this_might_help: The strongest failure mode is market-prior gap. Market microstructure may expose information arrival before fight time that is not present in fighter stats.

validation_gate.minimum: Must be evaluated with strict cutoff timestamps and no closing-line leakage.
validation_gate.promotion: Same market gate as all candidates.

feature_semantics.name: short_notice_flag_diff
feature_semantics.meaning: Whether either fighter accepted the bout with unusually short notice.

feature_semantics.name: rebooked_bout_instability_flag
feature_semantics.meaning: Whether the bout had late opponent or schedule instability.

new_data_candidates.why_this_might_help: Market may price late fight-week information that is absent from UFCStats-derived fighter history.

validation_gate.minimum: Requires timestamped source audit before modeling.
validation_gate.promotion: Same market gate as all candidates.

rejected_or_diagnostic_only.reason: Already tested. Improved ROI versus current XGBoost but worsened log loss and Brier and remained far below market.
Residual evidence shows a market-prior gap, not an internal fighter-stat signal. Treat as diagnostic unless line-movement data is added with strict pre-fight cutoff.
Mass search showed best candidates are effectively 1% model / 99% market blends and still worsen probability quality.
